experiences.title: Employee Management System (Academic Project)
details: Built a CLI-based system in C using singly linked lists and dynamic memory allocation
Implemented salary computation with allowances, deductions, and tax estimation
Led debugging and enhancement of switch-case logic for flexible user interaction

experiences.title: Smart India Hackathon 2024 – Hybrid Rescue-Raptor
details: Proposed a hybrid robo-drone with autonomous AI, thermal imaging, and robotic arms for emergency rescue
Collaborated on system architecture and technical pitching during inter-college selection
